title: Weapon Enhancement│武器強化
description: As the name suggests, this data pack strengthens all equipment that can be used as weapons.│顧名思義，這個數據包強化了所有可以做為武器的裝備。
body:
# Function│功能
- Attacking with an axe, hoe, shovel, or pickaxe will only deal 1 point of damage to that weapon.│使用斧、鋤、鏟、鎬攻擊時只會消耗其1點耐久度。
- Attacking with a mace will also deactivate the shield for 5 seconds.│使用重錘來攻擊也能停用盾牌5秒。
